title: Octo Checkout — DB Slowness Correlated With Chaos
description: Surfaces p95 DB latency spikes on the Octo checkout workflow and splits them by whether a chaos scenario was active. Used by the coordinator db-slow-remediation playbook.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Workflow ID' = 'checkout' | stats pct('DB Elapsed ms', 95) as p95, countif('HTTP Status Code' >= 500) as errors, countif('Chaos Injected' = 'true') as chaos_events by Service | sort -p95
notes: Feeds the Coordinator drilldown pivot; links directly to the APM trace for any offending request.
